title: AI Data Specialist - Hebrew
description: We are looking for AI Data Specialists to support the improvement of AI-generated content in Hebrew. Job Type: Freelance Location: Remote Work Schedule: Part-time - 10+ hours per week. Flexible - work whenever you want. Start Date: Immediately Duration: Until the end of December 2025 (an extension is possible) Rate: 13 USD per hour (rates vary per country. If you are based elsewhere, the rates will be different) Help Shape the Future of AI Are you a student, recent graduate, stay-at-home parent, gig worker, or professional seeking flexible remote work? Are you interested in shaping the development and safety of today’s AI models? What You’ll Do The task involves transcribing audio content by reviewing and editing existing Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) outputs. Participants must revise the ASR-generated text to accurately reflect the spoken audio, following the transcription and formatting guidelines provided by the Production team. This includes correcting errors, ensuring completeness, and maintaining consistency with the established standards. What we’re looking for: - Native-level fluency in Hebrew. - English Proficiency: Fluent or advanced proficiency in English (levels B2–C2). - AI & Data Capabilities (Preferred): Experience in one or more of the following areas: machine learning tasks, data collection and preprocessing, data evaluation and quality assurance, and data annotation and labeling. What We Offer - 100% remote work - Flexible schedule - Opportunity to earn extra income - Timely payments - The job is ideal for students, part-timers, or stay-at-home parents Please apply using a GMAIL account if you have one.
min_qualifications:
- Native-level fluency in Hebrew.
- English Proficiency: Fluent or advanced proficiency in English (levels B2–C2).
preferred_qualifications: - AI & Data Capabilities (Preferred): Experience in one or more of the following areas: machine learning tasks, data collection and preprocessing, data evaluation and quality assurance, and data annotation and labeling.
